creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Sean Bruno from comment #0)
> We have exactly 1 sparc64 machine left in the freebsd cluster and I just 
> updated it to 11-STABLE.  The build of lang/gcc seems to fail, but I'm
> not sure that we care. :-)

Full transparency:  I believe we should not care.  That may be close
to the only FreeBSD/sparc64 machine left running anywhere ;-), and it's
not SPARC machines are on the rise or anything.

That said, I just filed PR 216707 to update lang/gcc from GCC 4.9 to 5,
and, depending how tough that turns out, hope we can even go to GCC 6
later this year.  That seems energy better spent, and may eventually
benefit sparc64 even...
